opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It burns intensely every time I try to pee, I have to go every five minutes, and the bowl is turning pink with blood.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly overnight and it's so painful and I keep seeing blood, I can't sleep and I need something for it now.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on abruptly about 12 hours ago
symptom_narrative.character: a sharp, burning, stinging pain every time I pass urine, with a constant desperate urge to go
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really severe — the burning is agony and I feel like I can never fully empty
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: down below when I wee, and a dull ache low in my belly
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and worst on passing urine; the urge is almost non-stop
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: passing urine makes the burning worse each time
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: having to rush to the toilet every few minutes but only passing tiny amounts; urine has gone cloudy and smells bad; over the last few hours there's visible blood in it
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: stuck near the bathroom all night, unable to sleep because of the pain and urgency

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: the symptoms started not long after having sex

objective_data_offered.value: the toilet water turns pink and I can see blood when I pee
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's visual description of their urine; not laboratory-confirmed

objective_data_offered.value: my urine has gone cloudy and smells really foul
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own observation, not a measured or tested finding
